name: HRT_CHANNEL_SETUP_VL
query: SELECT B.CHANNEL_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.EMAIL_ID, B.CODE, B.TYPE, B.DEPENDENT_CHANNEL_ID, B.ENABLED, B.PAGENAME, B.INCOMING_SERVER_PROTOCOL, B.INCOMING_SERVER_HOST, B.INCOMING_SERVER_PORT, B.INCOMING_SERVER_AUTH_TYPE, B.INCOMING_SERVER_AUTH_KEY, B.INCOMING_SERVER_AUTH_VALUE, B.INCOMING_SERVER_BEARER_TOKEN, B.INCOMING_SERVER_SSL, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_PROTOCOL, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_HOST, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_PORT, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_AUTH_TYPE, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_AUTH_KEY, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_AUTH_VALUE, B.OUTGOING_SERVER_BEARER_TOKEN, B.RECEIVE_FOLDER, TL.NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_CHANNEL_SETUP_B B, HRT_CHANNEL_SETUP_TL TL WHERE B.CHANNEL_ID = TL.CHANNEL_ID AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = TL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
